ddls:
CREATE TABLE "seed_banks" (
  "seed_bank_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each seed bank */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the seed bank */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the seed bank */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the seed bank was established */,
  "based_in" TEXT /* Country or region where the seed bank is based */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the seed bank's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email */,
  "reputation_score" INTEGER /* Reputation score out of 100 */,
  "number_of_strains" INTEGER /* Number of different strains offered */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Text describing any certifications or awards */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the seed bank has been verified by the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("seed_bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "seed_bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seed bank being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-100) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was posted */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "recommendation" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user would recommend the seed bank */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_seed_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("seed_bank_id") REFERENCES seed_banks ("seed_bank_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promotions" (
  "promotion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotion */,
  "seed_bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seed bank offering the promotion */,
  "promotion_text" TEXT /* Text describing the promotion */,
  "discount_percentage" REAL /* Discount percentage offered by the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "promotion_code" TEXT /* Code to be used for the promotion */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the promotion is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promotion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promotions_seed_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("seed_bank_id") REFERENCES seed_banks ("seed_bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipping_policies" (
  "shipping_policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipping policy */,
  "seed_bank_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seed bank with this shipping policy */,
  "shipping_policy_text" TEXT /* Text describing the shipping policy */,
  "delivery_guaranteed" INTEGER /* Whether the seed bank guarantees delivery */,
  "min_order_value" REAL /* Minimum order value required for the shipping policy to apply */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated delivery time in days */,
  "delivery_countries" TEXT /* Text describing the countries where the seed bank ships to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipping_policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipping_policies_seed_bank_id FOREIGN KEY ("seed_bank_id") REFERENCES seed_banks ("seed_bank_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each article */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the article */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who wrote the article */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the article was published */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the article */,
  "featured_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the featured image for the article */,
  "is_premium" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the article is premium content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_articles_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the author's personal website or social media */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the author is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, content creator, user) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "is_verified" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user has been verified by the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being commented on */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was posted */,
  "is_editable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the comment can be edited by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "article_id" INTEGER /* ID of the article being rated */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_article_id FOREIGN KEY ("article_id") REFERENCES articles ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forums" (
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum topic */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the forum post */,
  "post_text" TEXT /* Text of the forum post */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the forum post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date when the forum post was created */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the forum topic is locked */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the forum topic has received */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forum_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forums_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forum_replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forum reply */,
  "forum_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forum post being replied to */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text of the forum reply */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who left the reply */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date when the forum reply was posted */,
  "is_editable" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the reply can be edited by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_replies_forum_id FOREIGN KEY ("forum_id") REFERENCES forums ("forum_id")
)
